title: TelemetrySummary
description: Output of the telemetry_summarize skill — aggregated token/cost/quality metrics grouped by chosen fields

groups.description: Top-N groups sorted by total_tokens descending

key.description: Group discriminator — one property per group_by field

total_tokens.description: Sum of total_tokens for all events in this group

avg_tokens.description: Integer average of total_tokens per event in this group

run_count.description: Number of events in this group

total_cost_cents.description: Sum of estimated_cost_cents for all events in this group

avg_quality_score.description: Average quality_score [0–1] for events in this group; null if no events reported quality_score

events.description: Total number of events loaded (across all groups, before top_n truncation)

total_tokens.description: Grand total tokens across all events

total_cost_cents.description: Grand total estimated cost in cents across all events

from.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the earliest event in the dataset (or empty string if no events)

to.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the latest event in the dataset (or empty string if no events)

status.description: ok = success (may have zero groups if events_dir is empty); error = unexpected failure

error.description: Human-readable error message; only present when status is error
